summary: Completed testing of Central Agent Orchestrator feature. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed - Agent Control Center page loads correctly with all 6 stats cards, 4 agents visible with proper status badges, notifications bell with dialog working, and 3 tabs (Overview, Analytics, Activity) functional. POSPage.js displayCurrency duplicate declaration bug has been fixed.
critical_code_review_comments: Central Orchestrator auto-starts agents on server startup via @app.on_event('startup') handler
4 agents registered: ui_blink_fix, error_autofix, performance_agent, error_fix_52
error_fix_52 agent shows 'stopped' status because it requires tenant-specific initialization (expected behavior)
POSPage.js displayCurrency is now only declared once (line 148 from useCurrency hook) - duplicate declaration bug fixed
seed_data_creation: Test error routed via POST /api/orchestrator/route-error created notification data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Central Agent Orchestrator feature is fully functional. Navigate to Agent Control Center from sidebar under 'Marketing & AI' section. The orchestrator auto-starts 3 of 4 agents on deployment (error_fix_52 requires tenant init). All orchestrator APIs are working: /api/orchestrator/status, /api/orchestrator/start-all, /api/orchestrator/stop-all, /api/orchestrator/notifications, /api/orchestrator/analytics, /api/orchestrator/route-error.

Backend API - GET /api/orchestrator/stat.details: Returns unified status with orchestrator_running, total_agents (4), running_agents (3), agents list with status/capabilities

Backend API - POST /api/orchestrator/sto.details: Stops all agents, returns stopped/failed arrays

Backend API - GET /api/orchestrator/noti.details: Returns notification list with limit/unread_only filters

Backend API - GET /api/orchestrator/anal.details: Returns routing analytics with total_errors_routed, total_fixed, success_rate, by_category, by_agent

Backend API - POST /api/orchestrator/rou.details: Routes errors to appropriate agent based on error category

Frontend - Agent Control Center page.details: Page loads with title 'AI Agents Control Center', 6 stats cards, 3 tabs

Frontend - Stats Cards.details: Shows Status (ACTIVE), Running Agents (3/4), Errors Handled, Fixes Applied, Unread Alerts, Failed Fixes (24h)

Frontend - Agents Overview tab.details: Shows all 4 agents with status badges (3 running, 1 stopped)

Frontend - Notifications bell.details: Shows unread count, opens dialog with notification list

Frontend - POSPage.js build.details: No displayCurrency duplicate declaration error, only declared once via useCurrency() hook destructuring
